deviations.what: The Slider `liveChange` handler (original onSliderMoved: byId('panelForGridList').setWidth(value + '%')) is dropped and replaced by a roundtrip-free expression binding on the host Panel.width (`{= ${/SLIDER_VALUE} + '%'}`), with Slider.value bound two-way to carry the value; per AGENTS.md 5 / CAPABILITIES 'prefer a pure expression binding over an event round-trip' (app 007 pattern). The width expression rendering is unverified in a running system.

GridList with a group sorter on items ({path, sorter:{path:'GROUP', descending:false, group:true}}, default group headers), an empty grid:GridBoxLayout customLayout, growing/growingThreshold, and a custom f:headerToolbar (Toolbar with Title, ToolbarSpacer, SearchField - the SearchField has no handler in the original). The 27 items are inlined 1:1 from the sample's own model/items.json; the GridListItem template (VBox>VBox+FlexItemData, Title, Label) binds {TITLE}/{SUBTITLE} 1:1.
